title: petiveriaceae
intro: The rank of Petiveriaceae is a family of flowering plants. It is a taxonomic grouping that consists of plants typically found in tropical and subtropical regions, often characterized by their unique leaf shapes and adaptations to their environments. The family is relatively small, comprising around 15-20 species of plants that are often herbaceous or shrubby in habit. Petiveriaceae is a distinct group within the broader plant kingdom, with its own set of characteristics that distinguish it from other plant families.
